abstracts.abstract: Report of the Executive Office for Administration and Finance (pursuant to Chapter 88 of the Acts of 2024, Section 10 of Chapter 1 of the Acts of 2025, and Section 88 of Chapter 73 of the Acts of 2025) submitting its Emergency Housing Assistance Program June 15, 2026 bi-weekly report

bill.title: Emergency Housing Assistance Program Bi-weekly June 15, 2026 Report
